programme.title: Taking the Stand
programme.desc: Richard Acosta, Jr. is being tried for murder, accused of being the getaway driver for his son.

programme.title: Taking the Stand
programme.desc: Charlie Adelson stands accused of hiring two hitmen to murder his ex-brother-in-law.

programme.title: Taking the Stand
programme.desc: After being sucker punched, freshman Steven Jones shoots four fellow students.

programme.title: Taking the Stand
programme.desc: Hannah Payne is on trial for the murder of Kenneth Herring, a motorist who fled an accident.

programme.title: Taking the Stand
programme.desc: Sasha Skare is on trial for the murder of her lover Martell DeRouen and has turned down a plea deal.

programme.title: Taking the Stand
programme.desc: Mauricio Guerrero takes the stand for breaking into the home of an OnlyFans content creator.

programme.title: Taking the Stand
programme.desc: Army Sergeant Demarcus Little is on trial for the murder of his ex-girlfriend Anitra Gunn.

programme.title: Taking the Stand
programme.desc: Richard Acosta, Jr. is being tried for murder, accused of being the getaway driver for his son.

programme.title: Taking the Stand
programme.desc: Charlie Adelson stands accused of hiring two hitmen to murder his ex-brother-in-law.

programme.title: Taking the Stand
programme.desc: After being sucker punched, freshman Steven Jones shoots four fellow students.

programme.title: Taking the Stand
programme.desc: Hannah Payne is on trial for the murder of Kenneth Herring, a motorist who fled an accident.

programme.title: Taking the Stand
programme.desc: Sasha Skare is on trial for the murder of her lover Martell DeRouen and has turned down a plea deal.

programme.title: Taking the Stand
programme.desc: Mauricio Guerrero takes the stand for breaking into the home of an OnlyFans content creator.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: An additional look at the "Top Five" most outrageous moments on "Court Cam."

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge takes down a violent offender; a lawyer's outrageous behavior leaves her client shocked.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A reckless driver ends up in court after a shocking car chase caught on camera.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A courthouse shootout ends with deadly consequences; a defendant given a life sentence explodes.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A demonic-looking defendant sends a threatening message to a jury; a courtroom officer goes too far.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A grieving father stares down the man who killed his daughter; a judge mutes an unruly defendant.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: After a failed plea, an angry mother flips the bird to the media after her son is sentenced.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge loses his job when his temper gets the best of him; a standard security check gets physical.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A quiet Michigan courtroom erupts into an all-out melee; a pro-pot defendant lights up a doobie.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge isn't happy when a defendant appears from her bed for a virtual hearing.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A courtroom drama surrounding a man who committed a grisly murder of his own parents.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A suspected murderer is attacked in court; an escape attempt; a convict assaults his lawyer.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge helps subdue an unruly defendant; a defendant tries to sing his way to a lighter sentence.

programme.desc: High-speed car and foot pursuit in South Carolina; drug bust in Missouri; public urination in Texas.

programme.desc: Drunken burglary; reckless driving and child endangerment; drug activity and animal cruelty.

programme.desc: High-speed chase in South Carolina; armed robbery in Ohio; welfare check in Rhode Island.
